title: A for Azhaguirukku Lyrics Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: A For AzhaguIrukku
Singer: Ramya NSK
Music: Vijay Antony
Lyricist: Madhan Karky
Movie: Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam

A for azhaguirukku
B for bayamedukku
C for kaasirukkaa
D for dhillirukkaa.

Chekka sivandha seen muttaai
Naan sela onnu kattikittaa.
Saththaanin kutiparinji
Saami aada vandhu puttaa.

Kaama veriyodu neeyum roatil  thedaadha,
Paavapatta maana ellaam vettai aadaadha.

Kaasu veesu naan varuven
Kaasu veesu naan varuven
Kettadhellaam naan Tharuven
Raawaa venam kannaa thanni mix pannu
...ponna fixu pannu ..

A for azhaguirukku
B for bayamedukku
C for kaasirukkaa
D for dhillirukkaa

Thaana in thozhil vilum
Poomaala naanirukka ..
Poo pinju mottugala
New pichu eriyaadha ...

Adi vaadina thulli varum
Vedi naan kaththirukka.
Venaannu sollum ponna
Nee thottu ilukkaadha

Kadhal pola kobam pola
Kaamam our unarchithaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song A for Azhaguirukku?

The music was composed by the talented composer Vijay Antony.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song was beautifully sung by Ramya NSK.

What is the release year of the movie Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam?

The movie was released in the year 2014.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Madhan Karky.

What is the mood of the song?

The song has a peppy and energetic mood, making it perfect for celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song A for Azhaguirukku from the movie Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam, released in 2014, is a lively and energetic track. Featuring the vocals of Ramya NSK and the music composition of Vijay Antony, the song is characterized by its catchy lyrics written by Madhan Karky. The vibrant beats and playful tone make it an ideal choice for parties and celebrations. This song adds a dynamic and entertaining element to the movie, enhancing its overall appeal.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of A for Azhaguirukku from the movie Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam. Sung by the talented Ramya NSK with music composed by Vijay Antony, this song is a delightful blend of catchy lyrics by Madhan Karky and energetic beats. Dive into this musical treat that perfectly complements the film's dynamic narrative.
stanzaMeanings: Song: A for Beauty Singer: Ramya NSK Music: Vijay Antony Lyricist: Madhan Karky Movie: Kathai Thiraikathai Vasanam
A for beauty, B for fear, C for money, D for courage.
A red sugar candy, I tied one to my saree. The devil noticed and the deity came to dance.
Don't wander the streets with lustful intent, and don't hunt the innocent deer.
I will come with money and wealth, I will fulfill all requests. Mix the drink with water, and fix the girl.
A for beauty, B for fear, C for money, D for courage.
While I am here with a garland of flowers, don't let the new flower buds wither.
I am a firecracker ready to burst, don't provoke the girl who says no.
Love, anger, and lust are all emotions.
